rules.description: Reject skill creation calls that omit the skill name. Mirrors the v0.1 hardcoded check.
Warn when the skill name uses the plugin namespace separator ':' (e.g. 'plugin:foo').

then.message: skill name looks like a plugin namespace

rules.description: Require the combined content/description to be at least 20 non-whitespace characters.

then.message: skill content or description is too short

rules.description: Block creation when the content matches a known secret pattern (API keys, JWTs, private keys, etc.).

then.message: skill content appears to contain a secret

rules.description: Informational marker emitted when dry_run=true causes the engine to downgrade the decision to warn. The downgrade itself is applied by the engine after rule evaluation; this rule only records the reason.

then.message: dry_run=true downgraded enforcement decision to warn
